s_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1704685328,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7432703749476338750","book_info":{"abstract":"（三国+爽文+截胡名将美女+争霸天下】
周恒穿越三国，正值建安二年。
曹操宛城降张秀，本想辅佐曹操改变一炮害三贤的命运，称霸天下，没想到却被曹操与妖言惑众，惑乱军心之名赶了出来。
无奈之下，再次投靠刘备，又被张飞无故暴打，刘备冷眼旁观。
“好好好，你们这么玩是吧，做不成谋士，那我只好一统天下。”
开局截胡糜夫人，暴打曹阿瞒。
曹操痛哭流涕：“悔不当初啊，子修，子修我错了，呜呼哀哉子修，悲呼子修。”
刘备更是捶胸顿足，狂扇自己耳光：“大才就在我眼前，居然被我逼走了，我之过也。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f8451392eef16980b76d0bba72c50c03","author":"洋辣子","author_id":"","book_id":"7432703749476338750","book_name":"三国：不要我当谋士只好四分天下","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7432703862198239806","read_count":"28185","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"404516"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"200","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,三国,多女主,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc609edfa0211b8651db003377c1d1d82~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779444201&x-signature=aH2CSjlWU9s0HbJ2zRSUe6RxOdU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"150005679143896","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"179"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231803212F16BA1E1E2CFCE5E3C6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarde
